name: jbp-lesson-deck
description: Build a rich Anki deck for one lesson of a "Japanese for Busy People" textbook from a USER-PROVIDED EPUB. Extracts vocabulary, Word Power sets, Key Sentences, and grammar example sentences into a two-template (recognition + production) Anki deck with kana, romaji, usage hints, and cropped textbook illustrations. Reads every page (never infers content from headings), and presents an audit table (English / Kana / Romaji / textbook page / image? / audio?) for review. A second phase generates per-card audio with ElevenLabs TTS (kana to MP3, cached per voice) once the content is approved and a voice is chosen; API keys come from the ELEVENLABS_API_KEY env var only. Per-user romaji fixes and cross-run learnings persist in a git-ignored state home outside the plugin cache.
